intro: | Regina: Hey, {name}. I'll just call you nerd, it's easier.
| Regina: Since you decided to be a nerd today, I'll be guiding you through the questions.
Regina.correct: | Regina: Plus points to becoming more of a nerd!
Regina.incorrect: | Regina: Girl, even I knew the answer to that. Do better.
Regina.no: | Regina: You're really gonna quit now? Ugh, thanks for wasting my time, nerd!
final: | Regina: Girl, how are you THIS bad? Get ready to fail that quiz or whatever
| Regina: Now WHAT is going on inside your head?
| Regina: How bad do you have to be to get this score?
| Regina: You're almost worthy of being called your name, nerd

intro: | Rodrick: To cut it short, I'll be guiding you through a series of questions that you have to answer!
Rodrick.incorrect: | Rodrick: This is why we have a tutoring session, right? Let's do better!
Rodrick.yes: | Rodrick: Okay! Let's move on then!
Rodrick.no: | Rodrick: Oh, well let me know if you need me!
final: | Rodrick: Oh, this just means Biology might not be your strongest suit. This doesn't mean your bad or anything!
| Rodrick: Umm, look at the positive side. You got a point! Try another session and you'll surely get better!
| Rodrick: Well, you did try your best! You'll surely get better with one more session!
| Rodrick: Huh, you actually passed! Try again and you'll surely get a better score!
| Rodrick: So close! Just try one more session and that perfect score is surely yours
| Rodrick: Good job! Your efforts will definitely pay off. Now, go ace that test!
